name: Pin High Golf Center
about: Pin High Golf Center is an indoor golf facility featuring TRACKMAN iO simulators. They offer a range of services including hourly bay rentals, simulator memberships, and golf lessons provided by PGA professionals. The venue is focused on both play and practice, with indoor season rates for non-members and various membership options that include monthly bucket allocations and discounted simulator time. Outdoor facilities are closed for the season. The facility provides a comprehensive environment for golfers looking to improve their game through technology and professional instruction.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TRACKMAN iO technology for accurate ball and club tracking
Comprehensive video analysis using the OnForm Coaching app for swing improvement
Flexible pricing with hourly rates, memberships, and league options for all skill levels
Professional PGA instruction available for both indoor and outdoor lessons
Dedicated focus on player development through technology and data

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned. BYOB policy not confirmed.
No alcohol service mentioned. BYOB policy not confirmed.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium dual radar launch monitor used for simulation and lessons
Launch monitor also used by instructors for lesson data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are expected to bring your own golf clubs when booking a simulator bay or lesson.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a BYOB policy. It is recommended to call the venue directly for confirmation.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific timing for 18 holes. It's best to contact the venue directly for estimated play times.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers junior lessons and has programs for younger golfers, making it suitable for families and juniors.
